final:
module monte_carlo_sim (
    input [4:0] rand_val,
    input ctrl,
    output reg [4:0] output_num
);

always @(*) begin
    if (ctrl) begin
        output_num = rand_val * rand_val; // Squared value of rand_val
    end else begin
        output_num = ~rand_val; // Inverted value of rand_val
    end
end

endmodule
